about.title: About
about.subtitle: Engineer, author, builder
about.bio:
4th-year computer science and engineering student at INSA Hauts-de-France, I work daily at the intersection of cybersecurity, full-stack development, and cloud architecture. Through my apprenticeship at SEMR (smartfone.fr / magicrecycle.com), I manage the internal ERP, Scaleway infrastructure, and major e-commerce migrations.

Beyond code, I authored a book on personal discipline (MORSE), placed 2nd nationally at the Inter-INSA x VINCI 2026 eloquence contest, and founded LanceOS, a SaaS platform for freelancers.

Three words: curious, organized, creative. One conviction: technical skill without vision is worthless.
